title: eknepho #1594
definition:
1) to return to one's self from drunkenness, become sober
 2) metaph. to return to soberness of mind
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to return to one's self from drunkenness, become sober
 2) metaph. to return to soberness of mind

    NASB:  to become sober (after drunkenness):
